name: lessence-noire
description: L'Essence Noire - monorepo (client React/Vite + server Express/MongoDB)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm --workspace client run dev" "npm --workspace server run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace client run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace server run lint && npm --workspace client run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace client run typecheck
